summary: SPK RC 31 sua transcode proxy tren SQLite/SPK: request tao proxy gio enqueue job that cho worker inline.
changes: Sua worker-runtime de backend sqlite cua SPK di theo queue that thay vi roi ve sim mode; request tao proxy gio chen transcode_jobs cho worker inline xu ly.
Metrics queue/running gio doc DB that cho ca SQLite va Postgres; chi memory mode moi dung pending dem gia lap.
Bo sung regression test cho SPK sqlite de khoa chat bug 'bam tao proxy nhung worker khong bao gio nhan job'.
